{{Infobox character
| name = Patriarch's wife
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Bloodline (novel)|Bloodline]]
}}

== Bloodline ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Kazan]] [[Patriarch's wife]] is an [[Iron]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c10">''Bloodline'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Patriarch's wife]] wears an iron badge as a breastplate.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c10" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Patriarch's wife]] wants to take [[Maret]] back.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c10" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|"Maret! Forgiveness, please, I’ll take him!"<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c10" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
